title: Legends of Zenith
description:
RPG modpack.
Adds some stuff, duh.
body:
# Zenpack version 1.0

Welcome to the Mystical Adventures Modpack, an immersive Minecraft experience like never before! Dive into a world where magic, epic weapons, and challenging dungeons await you. Craft your destiny and harness the power of a unique passive skill tree that allows you to customize your character's abilities and playstyle.

## Features:

### 🌟 Passive Skilltree:
Discover a revolutionary passive skilltree system that lets you tailor your character's progression. Choose from a variety of skills and enhancements to shape your adventurer into a formidable force.

### 🧙‍♂️ Magic:
Unleash the arcane arts with a diverse magic system. Learn powerful spells, brew magical potions, and explore the depths of mystical knowledge to become a master sorcerer.

### ⚔️ Cool Weapons:
Equip yourself with a vast array of cool and powerful weapons. From enchanted swords to magical staves, each weapon offers a unique playstyle and strategic advantage.

### 🏰 Dungeons:
Embark on epic dungeon quests filled with challenges, puzzles, and treasures. Delve into the unknown, face formidable foes, and reap the rewards that await the bravest of adventurers.

### 👿 Bosses:
Prepare for epic battles against fearsome bosses that guard the most valuable loot. Test your skills and strategies as you challenge these powerful adversaries.

### 🦄 More Mobs:
Encounter a plethora of new creatures, both good and evil, scattered throughout the Minecraft world. From friendly companions to menacing monsters, the wildlife has never been more diverse.
